title: wolftpm: expand Error type with TPM_RC codes
description:
Replace the stub Error type in wolftpm/src/error.rs with a complete implementation covering TPM_RC error codes.

## What
Current error.rs has a placeholder Error::Tpm { code, func } variant. Expand to:
- Map TPM_RC_* values to named variants or a structured Tpm { rc: TpmRc } variant
- Provide a wh_error_name-style lookup table for TPM_RC symbolic names
- Error::check(rc, func) helper matching the wolfhsm pattern
- impl Display with human-readable messages
- impl std::error::Error

## Files
- wolftpm/src/error.rs (replace stub)

## Reference
TPM_RC codes are in wolftpm-sys bindings (TPM_RC_* constants from wolftpm/tpm2.h)
